response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, demonstrated leadership in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, and deep technical breadth across cloud, data, and systems — but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years in production-grade GenAI systems, vector databases, or RAG architectures, and his resume emphasizes DLang and general software craftsmanship over focused GenAI deployment.
strengths: Experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Proven track record in cloud-native systems (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker) and data pipelines
Strong technical leadership and mentoring via workshops, open-source projects, and cross-team collaboration
concerns: No clear documentation of 8+ years specifically in GenAI or production LLM systems
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architectures in resume
Limited evidence of customer-facing technical leadership or enterprise AI deployment
